regions.text: (Illustration: Statue of Gautama Buddha). In India: Buddha and the Bhagavad-Gita.
(Illustration: Confucius). In China: Confucius and Mencius.
Through speech and writing, humans created visions of what we should become. We have lived by these ideas ever since.
You can now read 'The Wrath of Achilles', 'The Republic of Plato', and parts of the Bible in simple or Basic English.
